response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the required years of experience (19+ years senior engineering versus 8+ required with Bachelor's degree), their background is fundamentally misaligned with the role's requirements. This position demands specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance optimization, and deep neural network workload analysis. The candidate's entire career is rooted in web and backend software development with no demonstrated experience in hardware architecture, GPU design, AI accelerator optimization, SIMD/MIMD systems, or the performance analysis tools required for this principal-level hardware specialization.
strengths: 19+ years of senior and staff-level software engineering experience, exceeding the experience threshold for Bachelor's degree holders
Strong foundation in performance optimization and systems thinking, demonstrated through low-latency microservices architecture and async I/O patterns
Polyglot engineer with proven ability to learn and apply multiple programming languages and frameworks across domains
concerns: No experience with SoC or IP modeling, which is a core responsibility and technical requirement of the role
Complete absence of deep learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator performance analysis background
Career trajectory entirely in software engineering (web, mobile, backend) with minimal hardware-software co-design exposure beyond embedded robotics

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and SoC/IP expertise gap
Missing GPU and hardware architecture specialization
Meets years of senior experience requirement
